judge_result.short_rationale: Matches the required eye-exposure actions and order: rinse eyes 15-20 minutes, then remove contacts after 5 minutes if present. The added do-not-stop-rinsing warning is source-grounded. Escalation is slightly broader than the trigger wording but remains safe and usable.
